title: Generative Flow Networks for Model Adaptation in Digital Twins of Natural Systems

methodology.problem_domain: Model adaptation in digital twins of natural systems
key_challenges: Noisy, delayed, destructive, or costly data acquisition
methodology.approach: Simulation-based inference using Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets)

technical_details.problem_formulation: Inverse problem (inferring parameters from observations rather than predicting outputs)
technical_details.solution_strategy: Preserving multiple plausible parameterizations rather than collapsing to single solution

contributions: Formulating mechanistic model adaptation in digital twins as simulation-based inference problem
Introducing generative adaptation mechanism using GFlowNets
Reporting empirical studies on smart farming models
